data.title: Xinhua Silk Road: Ningbo and China's shift from making things to making them smarter
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Beijing, the bustling Ningbo-Zhoushan Port located in Zhejiang Province along China's eastern coast remains constantly active. The port serves as a hub for numerous ships that continuously arrive and depart, contributing to the region's vibrant economic activities. Inland, factories operate non-stop, further enhancing Ningbo's significance. The port's strategic location facilitates seamless trade and transportation, with impressive traffic numbers showcasing its importance as a key economic center.

data.title: Trevi Therapeutics Announces Pricing of $150 Million Underwritten Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Trevi Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, revealed the pricing of its public offering on April 16, 2026. The company, trading under Nasdaq as TRVI, plans to offer 11,600,000 shares of common stock at $13.00 per share. This move is expected to generate around $150 million in total, minus expenses, discounts, and commissions. Additionally, Trevi has granted the underwriters an option to buy up to 1,740,000 more shares within 30 days at the same price, less discounts and commissions. The offering, which will solely feature Trevi's shares, is set to close on or around April 20, 2026, pending standard closing requirements.

data.title: T1 Energy Announces Pricing of Upsized Public Offering of Convertible Senior Notes Due 2031
data.description: Today, T1 Energy Inc. (NYSE: TE) disclosed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering, now set at $160.0 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 (the "Convertible Notes"). The Offering, initially set at $125.0 million, has been increased in size. T1 Energy Inc. referred to as "T1" or "T1 Energy," shared this information today.

data.title: AEVEX Corp. Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering
data.description: In Solana Beach, California, AEVEX Corp., a leader in unmanned systems, publicized the pricing of its initial public offering. The offering consists of 16,000,000 shares of its Class A common stock priced at $20.00 per share. Moreover, AEVEX has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 2,400,000 shares of Class A common stock at the initial public offering price. AEVEX is a portfolio company of Madison Dearborn Partners' funds.

data.title: Circle sued for alleged involvement in $280M Drift Protocol hack, accused of aiding theft by not freezing stolen funds.
data.description: Circle faces allegations of assisting in the conversion of stolen funds and being negligent by failing to freeze assets stolen from the Drift Protocol back in April. The company is accused of aiding and abetting the conversion of undisclosed funds and not taking action to freeze a specific amount of money taken from the Drift Protocol earlier in the year.

data.title: Breaking the Sourcing Ceiling: APES 2026 Shanghai Unlocks Unfiltered Access to China's Premier Auto Parts Factories
data.description: The upcoming APES 2026 (Auto Parts Expo Shanghai) is set to revolutionize the automotive aftermarket sector. Scheduled to take place at the National Exhibition and Convention Center (NECC Shanghai) from August 5 to 7, 2026, this edition is expected to attract a significant number of industry professionals and enthusiasts. This event will play a crucial role in shaping the future of the sector as it adapts to changing market dynamics.
